title: Brent oil tops $105 on report Iran's top negotiator resigned
snippet: Brent rose 3% to close at $105.07, spiking to $107 on Ghalibaf resignation report. WTI advanced 3% to close at $95.85, spiking to $98. Trump's shoot-to-kill mine order also drove prices. 7th day of consecutive major swings. S&P -0.41%, Nasdaq -0.89%, Dow -0.36% as oil surge weighed on equities.
tag_reason: Oil closes above $105 — highest since Hormuz crisis began. Brent re-crosses $100 threshold for 2nd day. Major market mover.
